title: Outer Space Hanging Honeycomb Decor - Assorted Vibrant Colors Ceiling Decorations - Perfect for Galaxy-Themed Parties & Events - 3 Pcs
features: ASSORTED VIBRANT COLORS: Outer space hanging honeycomb decor comes in a stunning variety of colors that will instantly spruce up any galaxy-themed party or event, leaving your guests starry-eyed and mesmerized.
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING: Crafted with top-notch materials, these ceiling decorations are built to last, ensuring your parties and events stay lively and colorful throughout the entire celebration.

PERFECT FOR THEMED CELEBRATIONS: Transform your venue into an interstellar dreamscape with these outer space hanging honeycomb decor and elevate any space-themed birthday, cosmic event, or starry night gathering.

EASY TO HANG: Save time and effort with our hassle-free installation process. These honeycomb decorations come with an efficient hanging system that's a breeze to set up, giving you more time to enjoy the party.

3 PCS VALUE PACK: Get more bang for your buck. This 3-piece set gives you plenty of decorations to brighten up any party, ensuring your guests have an out-of-this-world experience. New and returning customers alike will love this top-tier party accessory.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Ruby Red Pumpkin Orange Sunflower Yellow Powder Blue Bright White Midnight Black Outer Space Birthday Add-On Items Rocket your Birthday party out of this world and WOW your guests with these interstellar designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Outer Space isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options.
